text.title: GitOps — Core Principles Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on platform + workflow + audit need.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: acknowledge-principles
step.action: Walk through the four OpenGitOps principles with team.

step.name: pick-tool-and-model
step.action: Document ArgoCD vs Flux rationale; choose pull or push.

step.name: define-break-glass-validate
step.action: Author break-glass procedure with audit target; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
